introSection: Wave Breaker: The Rescue Coaster is a steel launched roller coaster located at SeaWorld San Antonio in San Antonio, Texas, USA. It was manufactured by Intamin and opened on June 16, 2017.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride aims to recreate the experience of an animal rescue while educating guests on the work of SeaWorld's rescue team. It contains two launches and uses Intamin's jetski seating arrangement, similar to Jet Rescue at Sea World in Australia.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 trains with 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 16 riders per train. The front-car was revealed at the 2016 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

fullText:
Wave Breaker: The Rescue Coaster is a steel launched roller coaster located at SeaWorld San Antonio in San Antonio, Texas, USA. It was manufactured by Intamin and opened on June 16, 2017.

The ride aims to recreate the experience of an animal rescue while educating guests on the work of SeaWorld's rescue team. It contains two launches and uses Intamin's jetski seating arrangement, similar to Jet Rescue at Sea World in Australia.

3 trains with 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 16 riders per train. The front-car was revealed at the 2016 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.
